hero.name: Saiful Islam
hero.title: Full-Stack Developer (Python & React)
hero.description: 6+ years building scalable backends, data-driven dashboards, and modern web apps with Python, Django, FastAPI, React & DevOps.

about.title: About Me
about.bio:
I'm a Full-Stack Developer (Python & React) with 6+ years of experience building scalable backend systems, data-driven analytics dashboards, and user-facing web applications. My work spans backend engineering, ETL pipelines, automation, and modern frontend development — helping teams deliver reliable, high-impact software and actionable insights.

Currently pursuing a Master's in Automotive Software Engineering at Chemnitz University of Technology, Germany. I combine strong backend fundamentals with a product-oriented mindset, focusing on clean architecture, code quality, performance, and long-term maintainability.

projects.title: Interactive Developer Portfolio
projects.description: A modern, interactive, and visually polished portfolio website built with Next.js, shadcn/ui, and Framer Motion.

projects.title: Facility Finder Chemnitz
projects.description: A map-based web application that helps users locate public childcare and education facilities in Chemnitz with filtering, geolocation, and JWT-based authentication.

projects.title: Bhalogari.com – Automotive Marketplace
projects.description: Developed a full-featured vehicle marketplace for Bangladesh with advanced search, comparison, and listing functionalities for new, used, and reconditioned cars.

projects.title: BlumenIT – E-commerce Platform
projects.description: Engineered a scalable e-commerce platform for selling IT products, including a custom PC builder, product management tools, and marketing campaign integration to boost engagement and sales.

events.title: DevOps Automation Intern
events.description: Built internal analytics dashboards using FastAPI and Django with Jinja2/Tailwind UI. Developed reusable Python automation packages for ETL workflows. Implemented ETL pipelines (Pandas, NumPy) extracting data from RTC, MySQL, and GitLab CSV sources into PostgreSQL with Plotly visualizations. Migrated defect management from IBM RTC to Jira, designed a reusable Jira integration layer, and automated bug creation from regression test failures. Improved backend performance with async endpoints, caching layers, and optimized queries.

events.title: Software Engineer
events.description: Developed and deployed scalable software systems including E-commerce and donation platforms. Automated CI/CD pipelines, optimized database queries, and enhanced performance by reducing page load times and improving deployment efficiency.

events.title: Software Engineer
events.description: Modernized legacy codebase, integrated third-party APIs, and developed a barcode-based fabric tracking system that boosted R&D efficiency by 40%.

events.title: Software Engineer
events.description: Built job and skill test platforms and national school information systems. Collaborated in Agile sprints, performed unit testing, and worked on interactive map-based data display.

institutions.degree: Master of Science in Automotive Software Engineering
institutions.description: Interdisciplinary program focusing on embedded systems, automotive electronics, control systems, and software engineering practices for intelligent vehicles.
achievements: Actively building projects alongside academic research

institutions.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science & Engineering
institutions.institution: International University of Business Agriculture and Technology
institutions.description: Focused on software development, data structures, algorithms, databases, and distributed systems with hands-on project work and research components.
